mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO custom_alert ( id_site, id_device_type, id_device, id_metric, `condition`, threshold, compare_to, time_from, time_to, `level`, notify_email, notify_web, alert_email, created_date, updated_date ) VALUES( #{id_site}, #{id_device_type}, #{id_device}, #{id_metric}, #{condition}, #{threshold}, #{compare_to}, #{time_from}, #{time_to}, #{level}, #{notify_email}, #{notify_web}, #{alert_email}, NOW(), NOW() );
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as id
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM device where id_site = #{id_site} AND id_device_type = #{id_device_type} limit 1
